text.message: Why are you constantly pulling from me bluw
I could’ve plowed you 2 orbits ago
But for some reason you are not stealing from the board leader
I am not his dev comp, makes no sense lol
his dev comp is on 2 pts
Red is much more of an idiot
not my optimal play but gotta do it
But they will constantly solo me
Smart smart, while I have 0 ore
Ok you will get solod now
cant keep road long term here
I wouldn’t have put it on you otherwise dummy
i have avoer 1000 i know what im doing
Blue and red sitting on 20 VPs and you are soloing me
Nah you’re getting solod rest of game
put your money where your mouth is
You guys might not want black buying devs dummys
He’s taking your VPs please use your brain
It’s like people have never played before lmao
AND you have road in hand
Their win condition is VPs and devs and you’re the only taking it from them lmao
you have a non knight in hand
you are the only player that can win this game
Blue sitting on like 4 VPs lol
Red I will anyways doesn’t matter lol
Thought blue was just giving red win, didn’t know he would actually block him
Shut up, you have 0 chance to win
all of my rolls were winnig
I was focused all game and still beat your sorry record
